positive: Minimalist abstract jungle scene illustration, featuring stylized tropical leaves, exotic ferns, and delicate monstera silhouettes against a clean, solid pastel sky background. The composition should utilize negative space effectively, focusing on clean, interlocking geometric shapes and organic curves. Color palette is limited to deep jungle emerald, tropical teal, soft sage green, and crisp cream white. High contrast linework with flat color fills, ideal for a centered, repeating pattern on apparel. Vector art style, sophisticated flat graphic design, clean edges, perfect symmetry, poster illustration quality.
negative: photorealistic, 3d rendering, logo, text, watermark, blur, noise, artifacts, sloppy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, jpeg artifacts
